{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323161709A32C69EEA66CE585CAB8"}"},"total":26},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614365324927910681","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常的好看，[吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜][赞][赞][赞][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][求爆更][求爆更]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772862079,"group_id":"7595541134462422078","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4RaWQfgsL8UhvMbWp1BZrhDXWZqPs57d7EUIqz+jgQO","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9e7f536929ac47e59e6a7b18672a49ca~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793511&x-signature=KJnx74yfhXjb5hqli4DrYcBLCvk%3D","user_id":"1827832129398308","user_name":"伊人归🐉🐉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1827832129398308","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595541134462422078","book_info":{"abstract":"胎穿大唐成为唐太宗李世民，却梦到一个叫泾河龙王的冤魂向自己索命，紧接着就是无常勾魂，直到这时李二才明白直接穿越到了西游世界之中。
作为人间帝王，李二怎甘心被佛门算计。
先是砸了地府，然后将大唐境内的和尚全部杀光，就连唐僧都没有放过。
天庭：“唐王你竟然敢打砸地府，已犯下滔天罪责，玉帝降下法旨大唐内三年不得下雨！”
李二：“朕乃天子怎不知天要降罪，你肯定是假传天意，秦琼尉迟恭何在，震杀此獠！”
“对了，朕听说玉帝没有儿子，朕作为天子，那大天尊的位置以后是不是要由朕来继承？”
佛门观音：“佛法东渡，佛门大夏此乃天数，唐王你违背天意竟然敢杀了我佛门的天命取经人金蝉子，次此因果该如果了结？”
“不就是吃了个知了猴嘛，没赦免大不了的，既然你佛门认为这经非取不可，那朕亲自造访灵山，希望你们能承受的住！”
一路上收天庭三大反骨仔为徒，三千玄甲军、陌刀队随行，重装合成旅紧随而至，极道帝兵东风5C后发先至直奔西天大雷音寺！
路径各国，李二道：“朕自东土大唐而来，是前往西天败佛囚经的！”
各国国王：“您有此等实力还取什么经啊，如来怎能如此不懂事，为什么就不能亲自把经书送来呢！”
此世人族当立，纵使圣人也要俯首！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3cf4662a71912f27e7e3bd1e1a01be8f","author":"冷无梦","author_id":"","book_id":"7595541134462422078","book_name":"天子是人族枷锁，更是神佛的枷锁","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7595541224413479486","read_count":"77939","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"333672"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"153","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,西游衍生,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d36ed7c4033838e9ef0ce9ebe34eeaac~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779437829&x-signature=7lGb%2BWkjKtGGhwtUTEMqsTIzksM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"56717423340","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"169"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323161709A32C69EEA66CE585CAB8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":31175,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":35563,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1523},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1772864283,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614504193667941182","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有想法作者，盼星星盼月亮终于盼到了，实际上三天时间跨越1800公里的距离，把这份远方的感动送来已是极速，但人心的期盼比时间的跨度更为长远，所以才会觉得度日如年。这个商品的意义在一个吃货手里重于千斤，每一口感动都充满嚼劲，这不单单是简单乏味的□腹之欲，这是心灵上的一种洗涤和释放^我——璃莹殇·安洁莉娜·樱雪羽晗灵·血丽魑·魅·J·Q·安塔利亚·伤梦薰魅·海瑟薇·蔷薇玫瑰泪·羽灵·邪儿·凡多姆海威恩·夏影·琉璃舞·雅·蕾玥瑷雅·曦梦月·玥蓝·岚樱·紫蝶·丽馨·蕾琦洛·凤·颜鸢·希洛·玖兮·雨烟·叶洛莉兰·凝羽冰·泪伊如冰落·殇心樱语冰凌伊娜·剁手，觉得这个宝贝非常不错！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772893214,"group_id":"7595541134462422078","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4+GpnDoDP82BQe3tiPZ/fQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bd69f82bef2f42d385ce7cb6728285c9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794607&x-signature=o5%2BgbBfM86f1ADsuH9k1Ig1v03Q%3D","user_id":"100774081125","user_name":"叫爸爸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100774081125","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775663131,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4
